params.name: UN Forest Instrument
params.description:
On Nov 30, 2012, the United Nations General Assembly officially proclaimed International Day of Forests!
The United Nations Forest Instrument is a principled declaration on forest issues adopted by the United Nations Conference on Environment and Development. The document establishes four major global forest goals, including sustainable management and restoration of forests, enhancing the economic, social, and environmental benefits of forests, increasing the area of protected forest land wor …
